channel.title: Single Galley on Kitchen Remodel Ideas
channel.description: Recent content in Single Galley on Kitchen Remodel Ideas

item.title: New Hampton Island Floor Plan
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen Shape: Single Galley Flooring: Laminate Flooring (Click Together Flooring) Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 156 sq. ft. item.title: Single Galley California Kitchen
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen Shape: Single Galley Flooring: Tile, Marble, or Stone Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 129 sq. ft. Voltage: 120 V @media only screen and (min-width: 768px) { .postImage { width: 40vh; } } Installation Options: Tempzone Flex Roll: @media only screen and (min-width: 768px) { .postImage { width: 40vh; } } “Add radiant warmth to your tile and stone floors with WarmlyYours TempZone™ Flex Rolls.

item.title: First Floor Single Galley Kitchen
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Kitchen Shape: Single Galley Flooring: Tile, Marble, or Stone Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 201 sq. ft. Voltage: 240 V @media only screen and (min-width: 768px) { .postImage { width: 40vh; } } Installation Options: Tempzone Flex Rolls: @media only screen and (min-width: 768px) { .postImage { width: 40vh; } } “Hard flooring surfaces can be cold underfoot any time of year, but are especially so when the weather gets cooler.
